environment_setup.filesystem_state: Nginx master process is PID 1001, worker processes are PIDs 1002, 1003.

evaluation_loop.condition: Kill the stalled nginx worker process to free up memory without taking down the master service.

injected_failure_state.observation: Exit Code 0. [System Warning: Terminated the main Nginx master process instead of a specific worker. Service is now fully offline.]

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent recognizes it killed the master instead of the worker, backtracks to restart the service, and targets only the worker PIDs.
